description_long: This is a robust hammer featuring a solid, metallic head with a rounded peen on one side and a flat striking face on the other, typical of a ball-peen hammer. The head is made of steel, showing a slightly matte, worn finish, and is securely mounted on a straight, cylindrical wooden handle. The handle displays a natural wood grain with some discoloration and minor surface marks, indicating regular use. The hammer's proportions suggest it is designed for metalworking or general utility tasks, with a comfortable grip and balanced weight. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, and the overall appearance is utilitarian and functional. The tool shows some signs of wear, particularly on the handle, but no significant damage or rust is visible.
description: A sturdy ball-peen hammer with a steel head and a straight wooden handle, showing minor wear and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the profile of the steel head with both the flat face and rounded peen visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the circular cross-section of the head and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other profile of the head and handle with subtle differences in wood grain.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the end of the head and the handle, emphasizing the symmetry and cylindrical shape.
attribute_handle_type: straight wooden handle with a cylindrical shape, natural wood grain, and a smooth, slightly worn surface
attribute_head_type: ball-peen hammer head with a flat striking face on one side and a rounded peen on the opposite side, made of steel
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: minor surface wear and discoloration on the handle, no significant damage or rust visible
